programme.title: The Fine Art Auction - Live!
programme.desc: Bid on works from the masters to modern contemporary art, all at unbelievable auction prices!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Operation Smile
programme.desc: Transforming lives and bringing smiles to children around the world.

programme.title: Rare Limited Silver
programme.desc: Secure the lowest mintage Philadelphia Proof Silver Eagle ever issued by the US Mint with this 2026 Congratulations Set Silver Eagle graded PF70UCAM. This coin boasts a minscule 60,000 mintage limit, housed in a signed First Day of Issue holder.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: 1800's Classic Silver Treasures
programme.desc: Add the stunning set of 2 1881 and 1885 Carson City Silver Morgan Dollar in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your numismatic collection. These epic rare silver coins have miniscule mintages of 296,000 and 228,000 respectively.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Rare 1920's Silver
programme.desc: Add a 10-Coin or 20-Coin Roll of the iconic Peace Silver Dollars from 1922-1925 in Brilliant Uncirculated condition to your collection. Honoring the peace achieved after WWI, these Classic American Silver coins boast historical significance.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.title: Coveted Rare Gold
programme.desc: Secure a now coveted 2024 High Relief 1oz Gold Liberty & Britannia in Proof 70 condition for your collection. This is the first coin to display Lady Liberty & Britannia together and is the rarest coin of the series with only 10,000 struck.

programme.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programme.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An immersive murder mystery experience; an app that turns any video into a game; self-service grocery stores; allergen-free baked goods; guest Shark Jason Blum.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A solution to combat telemarketers and scammers; an easy-to-use 3D printer for kids to design and make their own toys; a savings and gifting online platform for kids; ethical and customizable meat box subscription delivery service.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A solution to remembering passed loved ones by turning their ashes into diamonds; redesigned men's classic fashion staple; innovation to wireless charging.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A unique vegan take on a beloved drink; a product for easily removing hair from one's hands in the shower or bath; a product designed to enhance one's tattoo; an electric bike company; an update on Prime 6, a sustainable charcoal company.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A service that helps people find and hire music instructors; a way to stop accidental fire sprinkler activations; a battery charger made using fire and water; all-inclusive project kits; an update on a past investment.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Guest judge Emma Grede; a healthy alternative to bacon; a product designed to aid a favorite childhood activity; an adaptive clothing line with a mission to increase comfort for those struggling due to a disability; a product designed for dancers.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: An immersive murder mystery experience; an app that turns any video into a game; self-service grocery stores; allergen-free baked goods; guest Shark Jason Blum.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A family-made Eastern European pierogi; a permanent fix for lost phone chargers; a kitchen fan that prevents "onion eyes"; a smart mini fridge designed for drinks.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Pitches include miracle berries, a clothing brand founded on mental health, edible food paint for children and satin-lined headwraps.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: A unique vegan take on a beloved drink; a product for easily removing hair from one's hands in the shower or bath; a product designed to enhance one's tattoo; an electric bike company; an update on Prime 6, a sustainable charcoal company.
